message:
feat(reviews): add ReviewList to bundle pages + fix report error handling

- Integrate ReviewList into bundle detail pages so users can review bundles
- Fix silent error catch in ReviewCard.handleReport: now shows error state
  to users when report submission fails
- Add aria-expanded to author response toggle for accessibility

Part of Ratings & Reviews EPIC (jeffreysprompts.com-9wk9).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
